phase_results.phase_0_inventory: done (WebSearch + targeted URL discovery per council; 11 URL patterns per playbook)
phase_results.phase_1_archive: done (9 PDFs archived: 8 direct_https + 1 Wayback for Hampshire democracy.hants.gov.uk; 1 Sheffield Pay Policy blocked entirely → CE salary sourced from SoA instead)
phase_results.phase_1b_page_images: deferred — field_sources has sha256 + url anchor but not page_image_url
phase_results.phase_2_extract: done (pdftotext -layout extraction of CE salaries, reserves, general fund balances)
phase_results.phase_3_strip: done (batch Node script /tmp/batch-6-apply.mjs applied Bradford checklist uniformly; 13 fields × 5 councils + 2 per-council exceptions)
phase_results.phase_4_populate: done (5-7 field_sources entries per council with NORTH-STAR §4 schema)
phase_results.phase_5_validators: 0 errors, 0 regressions. Sheffield pre-existing band_d drift against GOV.UK fixed opportunistically (side-effect of ONS loader fix).

Hampshire.notes: Pay Statement 2025-26 via Wayback — moderngov blocked on direct fetch. CE salary £252,318 verbatim in para 23.

Essex.notes: SoA + Pay Policy both direct-fetched. Reserves £68.1m retained from pre-existing GOV.UK data (general reserves, not total).

Hertfordshire.notes: All 3 docs direct-fetched including CE role profile PDF (Tier 3 source for chief_executive). CE salary £251,808 verbatim in Pay Policy §4.4.

Sheffield.notes: Pay Policy blocked (moderngov + democracy subdomain). CE salary £213,454 (Kate Josephs) sourced from SoA Note 10a. Also fixed pre-existing band_d drift against GOV.UK 2025-26 reference.

Westminster.notes: Both docs direct-fetched. CE salary £232,389 (Stuart Love) from SoA 2023-24 Note 10a p.72.
